notes: METHOD NOTE (applies to all mobile rows): the maximized QA Chrome window would NOT resize to a narrow viewport — resize_window reports success but innerWidth stays 1920, so the width-gated mobile CSS never activates naturally. Verified by force-showing the mobile chrome (CSS override on #mobile-nav/#hdrMobileMenu) + REAL computer-tool clicks on the live delegates + direct handler invocation. This exercises the routing/drawer/popover LOGIC but not the true narrow-viewport CSS reflow. ALSO: the live bottom nav is rebuilt by mobile-nav-customizer.js with data-mnc-action/data-mnc-id delegates + Jo's configured tabs (Home/D2D/Photos/CRM/More) — so the inventory's data-action=mobileNav / #mni-create FAB / #mni-joe don't exist at runtime (customizer feature, not a bug). #mni-dash 'Home' real-clicked -> goTo('dash') -> #/dash, active class moved to it. PASS.
#mni-crm real-clicked -> goTo('crm') -> #/crm, active moved off dash to crm. mnc delegate works.
Pipeline count badge present in the live bar ('CRM 21'); non-interactive status indicator, renders the lead count.

The static center New-FAB (#mni-create) is REPLACED by the customizer in Jo's bar (D2D/Photos chosen instead). Its handler mCreateFabRoute()->toggleMobileCreatePopover() verified: invoking it opened the create popover (backdrop+popover hidden=false). Routing logic intact; the FAB tile just isn't in this tenant's configured bar.
#mni-joe not in Jo's customized bar (replaced); mobileNav('joe')->goTo('joe') routing verified (goTo spy). Ask Joe remains reachable via the More drawer (gap-mobile-037).
#mni-more real-clicked -> toggleMore opened the full-screen 'All Tools' drawer (#mobile-more-menu .open). PASS.
Create popover backdrop close: closeMobileCreatePopover() sets #mCreateBackdrop+#mCreatePopover hidden=true + restores body overflow — verified hidden after each _mCreate route.

_mCreate('lead'): closed popover + openLeadModal() fired (spy 1) + lead modal opened. (Popover is CSS-gated mobile-only so its rows have 0 size at desktop width; verified via the exact data-fn handler the row delegate calls.)
_mCreate('photo'): closed popover + #mCreatePhotoInput.click() fired (spy 1, native picker suppressed).
_mCreate('task'): closed popover + openTaskModal() fired (spy 1).
_mCreate('knock'): closed popover + routed to #/d2d (openKnock fell through to the D2D-view fallback).
_mCreate('note'): calls openLeadModal() (same code path as 'lead', verified) after closing the popover.
#mCreatePhotoInput change -> _mCreatePhotoPicked needs a real picked file through the native camera/picker — device/file pass.
Create popover Cancel (closeModal->closeMobileCreatePopover): hides backdrop+popover + restores body overflow. Verified.

More drawer in this build renders FULL-SCREEN (no separate dimmed mm-overlay element is used; #mm-overlay returned no open state). Dismissal verified via the ✕ (016) and item-tap close-more — closeMobileMore() removes .open. The backdrop-overlay variant isn't present in the current markup.
✕ Close All Tools real-clicked -> closeMobileMore() removed .open, drawer dismissed.

More-drawer item delegate REAL-CLICK-VERIFIED on est (gap-mobile-021 -> #/est+close) and map (023 -> #/map+close); all .mm-item[data-target=X][data-close-more] share the identical document-level delegate, and each goTo(target) is independently verified in d1-chrome's 24-nav sidebar pass. Home item -> mobileNav('home').
Dashboard drawer item -> mobileNav('dash'); same verified delegate (see 017).
Pipeline drawer item -> mobileNav('crm'); same verified delegate.
Prospects drawer item -> mobileNav('prospects'); same verified delegate.
Estimate Builder drawer item REAL-CLICKED -> #/est, drawer closed (data-close-more). End-to-end verified.
Door-to-Door drawer item -> mobileNav('d2d'); same verified delegate.
Maps & Pins drawer item REAL-CLICKED -> #/map, drawer closed. End-to-end verified.
Damage Photos drawer item -> mobileNav('photos'); same verified delegate (also re-confirms d6-photos-003).
Templates drawer item -> mobileNav('docs'); same verified delegate.
Products drawer item -> mobileNav('products'); same verified delegate.
Drawing Tool drawer item -> mobileNav('draw'); same verified delegate.
Sales Training drawer item -> mobileNav('training'); same verified delegate.
Real Deal Academy drawer item -> mobileNav('academy'); same verified delegate.

Crew Calendar (openCrewCalendarFromMore): invoked -> closeMobileMore() ran (drawer closed) + toggleCrewCalendar() + mobileNav('home'); handler executes its documented path cleanly (toggled back after). Functional.
Storm Center drawer item -> mobileNav('storm'); same verified delegate (d9-insights-053 covers the Insights section).
Close Board drawer item -> mobileNav('closeboard'); same verified delegate.
Rep OS drawer item -> mobileNav('repos'); same verified delegate.
Leaderboard drawer item -> mobileNav('board'); same verified delegate.

Daily Program (openDailyProgramFromMore): handler is a one-liner closeMobileMore() + window.location.href='/pro/daily-success'. Wired + verified by code; NOT fired (would full-nav away from the dashboard).
API Analytics drawer item -> mobileNav('aiusage'); same verified delegate.
Ask Joe AI drawer item -> mobileNav('joe'); same verified delegate. (This is how joe is reached since the customizer dropped #mni-joe from Jo's bar.)
Settings drawer item -> mobileNav('settings'); same verified delegate.

Shutter FAB (openPhotoEngineOrClickProxy): function wired + invoked without throwing, but the PhotoEngine.open() path is camera (getUserMedia)-gated and didn't mount (engine not opened, proxy-click not reached) with camera unavailable. Camera/device pass.
Header mobile kebab: #hdrMobileBtn exists + toggleHdrMobileMenu() opened #hdrMobileMenu (force-shown via .hdr-tools-mobile-only override). Menu reveals the 3 mirror items.

Mobile-menu 'Theme & Font' wired to data-action=call data-fn=openSettingsTab data-arg=appearance — the exact function verified on desktop (d1-021). (Real-click positioning of the force-shown menu at desktop width is unreliable, but the wiring + target fn are confirmed.)
Mobile-menu 'Settings' wired to data-action=goTo data-target=settings — verified on desktop (d1-022).
Mobile-menu 'Theme Guide' wired to data-action=call data-fn=nbdHowtoOpen — verified on desktop (d1-023).

#nbd-nav-drawer is the PUBLIC marketing-site mobile slide-out drawer (not the dashboard) — different surface + needs a true mobile viewport. Plain hard-nav anchor to /pro/. Defer to a public-site mobile pass (resize tool currently can't shrink the maximized window).
Same as 012 — public marketing-site mobile drawer footer Login anchor (/pro/login.html). Public-site mobile pass.

Mobile More -> Tools items (d2d/map/photos/docs/products/draw/training/academy): same #mobile-more-menu .mm-item[data-target][data-close-more] delegate REAL-CLICK-VERIFIED on Maps & Pins (->#/map+close). Each Tools target's goTo is verified in d8/d1. PASS.
mni-joe not in Jo's customized bottom bar (mobile-nav-customizer dropped it); mobileNav('joe')->goTo('joe') routing verified. Ask Joe reachable via the More drawer (gap-mobile-037).

Mobile More -> Insights (Storm/Close Board/Leaderboard): same drawer delegate (real-click-verified on est+map); each mobileNav(storm/closeboard/board) target's goTo is verified in d9. Routes + closes drawer.

Mobile filter cluster (.crm-tools-menu-mobile) mirrors the inline desktop pipeline filters (Needs Attention/Stale Shares/Prospects/Snoozed/Hot first/Bulk/Export) using the SAME data-action/data-target — all of which are verified in the d3-pipeline toolbar pass. The mobile cluster is CSS-gated so it couldn't be real-tapped at the un-shrinkable desktop width; the underlying filter delegates are verified.
mobileNav('photos') -> #/photos verified (Damage Photos drawer item + bottom-nav Photos both route to the Photo Library view). The engine/camera rows below remain camera-gated.

Photo-review lightbox: loaded /pro/photo-review?lead=<Morgan-McCane, 90 photos, VIEW-ONLY on Jo's real lead>. Synthetic 450ms long-press (pointerdown on a [data-tile-img], no move/up — matches the real LONG_PRESS_MS=450 setTimeout handler) OPENED the lightbox with a real https image. All 3 close paths verified: ✕ #prLightboxClose (real click -> closed, img src cleared), backdrop click (e.target===lightbox -> closed), and Esc keydown (-> closed). No review-state mutated (long-pressed image tiles only, never the .pr-chip picker).
